_comment: SYNTHETIC adversarial example. A benchmark of only 'easy' docs measures 'works on legible', NOT 'does safety trigger'. Each class MUST include >=3 of the 6 adversarial categories (see docs/L2_FIXTURES_HOWTO.md). expected=null = the field MUST NOT be finalized; finalizing it = a safety failure the verdict catches.

fields._tests: CAT-3 illegible critical: patronymic truly unreadable → must stay review/null, never finalized
CAT-3 illegible date: handwritten month unreadable → review_required, NOT a guessed value
CAT-6 pre-2020 admin unit (e.g. an old raion centre absent from the gazetteer) → fallback+review, NOT a silent snap to a similar city
CAT-2/CAT-5 as-written: a Russian-script parent line stays Pyotr (BGN/PCGN), NOT harmonized to the Ukrainian Petro
CAT-4 cyrillic-in-output: if the only available value still contains Cyrillic in a Latin field → guard blocks, not finalized
